mrc.label: MRC Scale
mrc.hint: Select the score (0 = no contraction, 5 = normal)

dinamometria.label: Grip Dynamometry
dinamometria.desc: Grip strength in kgf (R and L)

sit_to_stand.label: 30s Sit-to-Stand
sit_to_stand.hint: Start the 30 s timer and count complete repetitions while time runs.

tug.label: TUG
tug.hint: Patient stands up, walks 3 m, turns and sits. Start the timer on movement.

10mwt.label: 10MWT
10mwt.hint: Comfortable walking speed on a 10 m track.

tdr.label: Clock Drawing Test
tdr.desc: Upload or photo of clock drawing
tdr.hint: Upload a photo of the patient's clock drawing.
tdr.uploadZone: Click to select or take a photo

moca.label: MoCA
moca.preamble: Before starting: read these 5 words to the patient and ask them to memorise — Face, Silk, Church, Carnation, Red. Recall will be assessed at the end.

Orientação Temporal.title: Temporal Orientation
Orientação Temporal.hint: Ask: "What year is it? Season? Month? Day of the month? Day of the week?"

Orientação Espacial.title: Spatial Orientation
Orientação Espacial.hint: Ask: "What country, state, city, place and floor are we in?"

Registro.title: Registration
Registro.hint: Say slowly: "Car, Vase, Brick". Ask to repeat immediately.

Atenção e Cálculo.title: Attention and Calculation
Atenção e Cálculo.hint: "Subtract 7 from 100 and keep subtracting." Sequence: 93 → 86 → 79 → 72 → 65. Alternative: spell WORLD backwards.

Evocação.title: Recall
Evocação.hint: "Do you remember the three words I asked you to repeat? What were they?" (Car, Vase, Brick)

Linguagem e Práxis.title: Language and Praxis
Linguagem e Práxis.hint: Evaluate each item individually according to instructions.

items.l_cmd1: Command — Take the paper with your right hand
items.l_cmd3: Command — Put it on the floor
items.l_leitura: Reading — Close eyes when seeing "CLOSE YOUR EYES"
items.l_escrita: Writing — Complete sentence that makes sense

Visoespacial / Executiva.title: Visuospatial / Executive
Visoespacial / Executiva.hint: Alternating trail (1→A→2→B→3→C…), cube copy, clock with hands at 11:10.

Nomeação.title: Naming
Nomeação.hint: Show pictures of uncommon animals: lion, rhinoceros, camel/dromedary.

Atenção.title: Attention
Atenção.hint: Forward digits (5 numbers), backward digits (3 numbers), vigilance (tap on letter A) and subtractive calculation.

Linguagem.title: Language
Linguagem.hint: Repeat two long sentences exactly. Say as many words as possible starting with letter F in 1 min (≥11 = 1 pt).

Abstração.title: Abstraction
Abstração.hint: Ask what they have in common: "orange and banana" → fruits; "train and bicycle" → transport.

Evocação Tardia.title: Delayed Recall
Evocação Tardia.hint: Words read at the start: Face, Silk, Church, Carnation, Red. Ask at the end of the test.

items.a_vigil: Vigilance — tap when hearing letter A
items.l_frase1: Sentence 1 — "The cat always hid under the sofa when the dogs were in the room"
items.l_fluenc: Verbal fluency — ≥11 words starting with letter F in 1 min
